clauses.title: Non-Compete
clauses.body: Employee agrees not to work for direct competitors in the same city for 6 months following voluntary resignation.

clauses.title: Intellectual Property
clauses.body: Any invention produced by Employee during working hours using company resources related to company business shall be the exclusive property of Employer.

clauses.title: Termination
clauses.body: Either party may terminate with 30 days written notice. Employer may terminate immediately for gross misconduct with one month severance.

clauses.title: Governing Law
clauses.body: This agreement is governed by the laws of New York, USA.
